reasoning: The control PM-31-a focuses on continuous monitoring and logging of security events, which can be mapped to Kubernetes through audit logging and network policy changes. Kubernetes audit logging captures API server interactions, which is analogous to cloud API gateway logging. Ensuring audit logs are retained aligns with cloud log retention policies. Monitoring changes to network policies is similar to tracking changes in network ACLs in cloud environments.
